text:
Yes. Just tried again.

I noticed the problem yesterday, Friday October 22, 2021 and gave it 24 hours before reporting as I thought maybe something was down somewhere.

Is there another places where I can manually download:

soundtouch-soundtouch-e1f315f5358d9db5cee35a7a2886425489fcefe8_GL0.tar.gz

I checked on http://www.surina.net/ but they don't use the same file naming format so I assume that won't work.
